title: carex riparia var. rugulosa
intro: Carex riparia var. rugulosa, also known as variegated sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Carex riparia var. rugulosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Carex riparia var. rugulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
